examples.output: Yuki to send calendar invites for the fortnightly Tuesday slot by end of the week.

aiGuidance.extraction: Look for action assignments after the decision point: X will do Y by Z, the first step is..., or concrete commitments. Extract owner and timing if named.
aiGuidance.purpose: Lists concrete follow-up actions that emerge from the decision, with named owners and timing where stated. May be empty if no follow-up actions were recorded.

description: Actions or tasks that emerge from the decision.
name: next_steps
